pageContext.name: Goldfinger
pageContext.description: 'I am a poet in deeds -- not often in words.'  Sideshow is proud to present the Goldfinger James Bond Book Cover print by artist Michael Gillette. This officially licensed art is printed by Electric Works in San Francisco using archival inks on 100% Cotton Heavyweight rag paper with hand-torn deckle edges.  Each print is signed and numbered in pencil from an edition of 700. The prints are stickered on the back with copyright and licensing information.
